title: NOAA PolarWatch Data Catalog
description: STAC catalog of NOAA CoastWatch ice-related satellite datasets served via ERDDAP. Includes SAR ice classification and NRCS composites, plus VIIRS ice concentration, ice surface temperature, and ice thickness products from NOAA-20 and Suomi NPP. Covers North and South Pole regions (Polar Stereographic), daily and 4-day composites.
